screenshot_timeline.name: Screenshot Timeline
screenshot_timeline.description: Captures your screen, extracts on-screen text (accessibility-first, OCR fallback), and feeds magi memory.

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether the screenshot timeline sensor is active.

capture_scope.label: Capture scope
capture_scope.description: What part of the screen to capture each tick.

active_window_interval_sec.label: Active window interval (sec)
active_window_interval_sec.description: How often to capture the active window. Recommended: 10s.

full_screen_interval_min.label: Full-screen interval (min)
full_screen_interval_min.description: Periodic full-screen capture interval (used in hybrid or full_screen modes).

ax_enabled.label: Accessibility-first text
ax_enabled.description: Read on-screen text from the focused window's macOS accessibility tree first — exact, structured, ~0 CPU — falling back to OCR only when that tree is hollow (custom-rendered apps, games). Requires Accessibility permission. Turn off to always use OCR.

ax_wake.label: Wake Chromium/Electron apps
ax_wake.description: Send the AXManualAccessibility signal so Chromium/Electron apps (VS Code, Chrome, Slack…) expose their content to the accessibility tree. Off = only natively-accessible apps yield AX text. Imposes a small accessibility cost on the app being captured.

ax_min_content_chars.label: AX min content chars
ax_min_content_chars.description: Use AX text (skip OCR) only when the window's accessibility tree carries at least this many characters of non-control text. Lower = trust AX more often. Rich windows score 1000s, hollow ones <10.

ax_min_content_nodes.label: AX min content nodes
ax_min_content_nodes.description: Companion to the char threshold: also require at least this many non-control text nodes before skipping OCR.

ocr_languages.label: OCR languages
ocr_languages.description: Apple Vision recognition language codes (BCP-47), e.g. zh-Hans, en-US, ja. Order matters: the first language is the primary character-set hypothesis. If your screen is mostly Chinese with code/URLs mixed in, keep zh-Hans first; English-only users can put en-US first.

ocr_level.label: OCR recognition level
ocr_level.description: Apple Vision text-recognition precision tier. "Accurate" uses a neural network — handles small fonts, mixed-language text, and dense UI well, but takes ~0.5–2 s per screenshot. "Fast" uses traditional character recognition — 5–10× faster but small fonts, CJK characters, and busy UI degrade quickly. Most screen content is IDE / browser / chat-app chrome, so keep "Accurate" unless CPU usage is an issue.

original_retention_days.label: Original retention (days)
original_retention_days.description: Originals older than this are deleted. Thumbnails are kept permanently.

keyboard_triggers_enabled.label: Enable keyboard triggers
keyboard_triggers_enabled.description: Capture on scroll, arrow keys, space, or delete. Requires Accessibility permission.

keyboard_trigger_types.label: Keyboard trigger keys
keyboard_trigger_types.description: Which keys trigger a capture. Has no effect unless keyboard triggers are enabled.

app_blocklist.label: App blocklist (bundle IDs)
app_blocklist.description: Bundle IDs to never capture. Glob patterns supported (e.g. com.example.*). Defaults block known password managers and the macOS SecurityAgent; remove entries to allow them.

window_title_blocklist.label: Window title blocklist (substrings)
window_title_blocklist.description: Any window whose title contains any of these strings will be skipped.

panic_hotkey.label: Panic hotkey
panic_hotkey.description: Press to immediately pause capture. Format: Modifier+Modifier+Key.

panic_pause_seconds.label: Panic pause duration (sec)
panic_pause_seconds.description: How long to pause capture after the panic hotkey is pressed.

sync_mode.label: Sync mode
sync_mode.description: How the host should pull harvested bursts.

macos_permissions.title: macOS Permissions
macos_permissions.description: Screen Recording is required for capture. Accessibility is optional but recommended — it powers accessibility-first text extraction (cleaner than OCR); without it every frame uses OCR. Also needed for keyboard triggers and the panic hotkey.

accessibility.label: Accessibility
accessibility.description: Powers accessibility-first text extraction (cleaner than OCR), keyboard triggers, and the panic hotkey. Optional — without it, every frame falls back to OCR.

activation.title: Enable Screenshot Timeline
activation.description:
This plugin continuously captures your screen and runs local OCR (via Apple Vision) to feed the recognised text into magi's memory. Captures and thumbnails stay on this Mac — they are not uploaded anywhere. Originals are deleted after 30 days by default; thumbnails are kept indefinitely.

Password managers, Keychain, and incognito browser windows are skipped by default. You can add more app or window-title rules in Settings after enabling, and the panic hotkey (⌥⇧P) immediately pauses capture for 60 seconds.

macOS will ask for Screen Recording permission the first time captures start. Accessibility permission is optional (only needed for keyboard triggers and the panic hotkey).
